nodes.name: Puvel's illadopsis
nodes.summary: Puvel's illadopsis（Illadopsis puveli）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Puvel's illadopsis。

nodes.name: Illadopsis
nodes.summary: Illadopsis（Illadopsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Brown illadopsis、Pale-breasted illadopsis、Tanzanian illadopsis等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: Puvel's illadopsis
nodes.summary: Puvel's illadopsis (Illadopsis puveli) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. Its horizontal interrupted range of presence extends across the African tropical rainforest (mainly West Africa, on either side of the Dahomey Gap). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. References
